sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_data (id UInt32, latitude Float64, longitude Float64, h3_index UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO geo_data (id, latitude, longitude, h3_index) VALUES (1, 37.7749, -122.4194, h3_from_geo(37.7749, -122.4194, 7));
UPDATE geo_data SET h3_index = h3_from_geo(latitude, longitude, 5) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, h3_index FROM geo_data WHERE h3_index = h3_from_geo(34.0522, -118.2437, 8);
DELETE FROM geo_data WHERE h3_index IS NOT NULL;
